mapper.sql: select product_id, product_code, product_name, currency, card_theme, risk_tag, cover_image, gallery_images, product_content, trade_rule_content, single_rate, group_rate, cycle_days, interest_mode, principal_mode, interest_stage_count, principal_stage_count, stage_config_json, invest_mode, min_invest_amount, max_invest_amount, total_shares, sold_shares, total_amount, sold_amount, progress_percent, point_per_unit, growth_per_unit, red_packet_per_unit, coupon_enabled, group_enabled, group_size, auto_group, limit_level, limit_times, start_time, end_time, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_invest_product
mapper.select:
and product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%') and product_code like concat('%', #{productCode}, '%') and currency = #{currency} and status = #{status}
order by case when ifnull(progress_percent, 0) >= 100 then 1 else 0 end asc, ifnull(progress_percent, 0) desc, product_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_invest_product(product_code, product_name, currency, card_theme, risk_tag, cover_image, gallery_images, product_content, trade_rule_content, single_rate, group_rate, cycle_days, interest_mode, principal_mode, interest_stage_count, principal_stage_count, stage_config_json, invest_mode, min_invest_amount, max_invest_amount, total_shares, sold_shares, total_amount, sold_amount, progress_percent, point_per_unit, growth_per_unit, red_packet_per_unit, coupon_enabled, group_enabled, group_size, auto_group, limit_level, limit_times, status, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{currency}, #{cardTheme}, #{riskTag}, #{coverImage}, #{galleryImages}, #{productContent}, #{tradeRuleContent}, #{singleRate}, #{groupRate}, #{cycleDays}, #{interestMode}, #{principalMode}, #{interestStageCount}, #{principalStageCount}, #{stageConfigJson}, #{investMode}, #{minInvestAmount}, #{maxInvestAmount}, #{totalShares}, #{soldShares}, #{totalAmount}, #{soldAmount}, #{progressPercent}, #{pointPerUnit}, #{growthPerUnit}, #{redPacketPerUnit}, #{couponEnabled}, #{groupEnabled}, #{groupSize}, #{autoGroup}, #{limitLevel}, #{limitTimes}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_invest_product where product_id in
#{productId}
mapper.select: select tag_id from sys_invest_product_tag_rel where product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: update sys_invest_product set sold_shares = greatest(0, ifnull(sold_shares, 0) + #{delta}), sold_amount = greatest(0, ifnull(sold_amount, 0) + #{amountDelta}), progress_percent = least(100, greatest(0, case when upper(ifnull(invest_mode, 'SHARE')) = 'AMOUNT' and ifnull(total_amount, 0) > 0 then round(greatest(0, ifnull(sold_amount, 0) + #{amountDelta}) * 100 / ifnull(total_amount, 0), 4) when ifnull(total_shares, 0) > 0 then round(greatest(0, ifnull(sold_shares, 0) + #{delta}) * 100 / ifnull(total_shares, 0), 4) else 0 end)), update_time = now() where product_id = #{productId}

update sys_invest_product set sold_shares = greatest(0, ifnull(sold_shares, 0) - #{delta}), sold_amount = greatest(0, ifnull(sold_amount, 0) - #{amountDelta}), progress_percent = least(100, greatest(0, case when upper(ifnull(invest_mode, 'SHARE')) = 'AMOUNT' and ifnull(total_amount, 0) > 0 then round(greatest(0, ifnull(sold_amount, 0) - #{amountDelta}) * 100 / ifnull(total_amount, 0), 4) when ifnull(total_shares, 0) > 0 then round(greatest(0, ifnull(sold_shares, 0) - #{delta}) * 100 / ifnull(total_shares, 0), 4) else 0 end)), update_time = now() where product_id = #{productId}
